text:
Saturday, 21 March 2026, 14:47

21 March 2026

According to Ukrinform, the 28-year-old Ukrainian defeated two-time Olympic champion Arlen Lopez of Cuba in the semi-finals.

In the final match on August 7, Khyzhniak will face Nurbek Oralbay of Kazakhstan.

Photo: Getty Images

title: Ukrainian boxer Khyzhniak wins through to 2024 Olympics final
description: Ukraine's Oleksandr Khyzhniak has made it to the finals of the men's 80 kg boxing tournament at the Olympic Games in Paris. — Ukrinform.
